channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Australian Open: Keys upsets 2-time champion Sabalenka in women's final for 1st Grand Slam title
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Madison Keys of the United States upset two-time defending champion Aryna Sabalenka of Belarus 6-3, 2-6, 7-5 in the Australian Open final on Saturday night to collect her first Grand Slam title at age 29. By adding this win over the No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: After three-quarter heavyweight bout, Palo Alto throws knockout punch to beat Los Gatos in league clash
item.description: Prep boys basketball: In a game that resembled a street fight in its physicality, Palo Alto and star guard Jorell Clark threw the last, best punch in the fourth quarter to beat Los Gatos
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Block party: Shot-swatting Oakland Tech shuts down the paint in victory over rival Oakland
item.description: Oakland at Oakland Tech 2025: ArDarius Grayson and Xan Meyer-Plettner throw a block party as Bulldogs stifle rival Oakland
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team. The Hurricanes acquired forwards Mikko Rantanen from the Colorado Avalanche and Taylor Hall from the Chicago Blackhawks in a three-team trade Friday night.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The 49ers bring back Robert Saleh for 2nd stint as defensive coordinator
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers hired Robert Saleh for a second stint as defensive coordinator on Friday night after a failed tenure as head coach of the New York Jets. Saleh had been a candidate for head coaching jobs with Jacksonville, Dallas and Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Las Vegas Raiders agree to hire 73-year-old Pete Carroll as their head coach, AP source says
item.description: Pete Carroll has a youthful energy that many people half his age don't possess, and the Raiders hope that enthusiasm — and, more importantly, his proven track record — translates to Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Pirates 'bummed' after young collector, who scored one-of-a-kind Paul Skenes card, declines team's offer
item.description: The collector who landed the rare MLB debut patch card featuring pitching sensation Paul Skenes has declined a trade offer from the Pittsburgh Pirates.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Planted envelope, pilfered identities, money that didn’t exist: Bay Area couple accused of $60 million AI startup fraud
item.description: The indictment describes an enterprise constantly teetering on the edge of failure as the Beckmans allegedly solicited and obtained investments via false financial documents that dramatically overstated company sales, profit and bank balances.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Travis Kelce says he 'used to dream' of playing QB the way Josh Allen does
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — There are a lot of people that would love to be living Travis Kelce's life these days. He's a bona fide NFL star for the two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With Pete Carroll headed to Raiders and Liam Coen to Jaguars, 2 coaching openings remain
item.description: Pete Carroll is set to return to the sideline as a head coach following a one-year hiatus and Liam Coen is ready for his first shot at running an NFL team.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Women's Lacrosse looks to rewrite history
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Mesa University women's lacrosse team has been a dominant force in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference, finishing in second place for four straight years. This year, however, the Mavericks are determined to rewrite history.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card, Pirates says massive trade deal stands
item.description: The card, which contains the "Debut Patch" worn by Paul Skenes, quickly became a highly-coveted item. After months of search, an 11-year-old has reportedly come up with it.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, WGN 9
